join.title: Join Us
join.subtitle: Build the future of wealth management with Yino Asset.
join.card1_desc: Originating as a single family office managing proprietary capital, we consistently invest with an 'owner' mindset. All our asset management products involve significant co-investment of our own capital, ensuring our risks and rewards are perfectly aligned with our clients.
join.card2_desc: Every product and strategy undergoes a dual-layer vetting process by our Macro Strategy and Risk Management teams. This collaborative safeguard ensures maximum prudence in both product design and strategy execution.
join.card3_desc: We pursue sustainable long-term absolute returns. Beyond high performance, we prioritize drawdown control as our lifeline, aiming for superior risk-adjusted returns by strictly managing maximum downsides.
join.reason1_desc: With offices in Singapore, Hong Kong, and Hangzhou, you will gain direct access to leading global financial markets and international perspectives.
join.reason2_desc: Work alongside industry professionals in a collaborative environment that fosters continuous learning and the development of deep expertise.
join.reason3_desc: Guided by a buy-side philosophy, we serve our clients with integrity while enabling both individual and organizational growth.

asset_mgmt.title: Asset Management
asset_mgmt.quote: "Not just stewards of capital, but partners who share risk alongside you."
asset_mgmt.intro: In an increasingly uncertain global market environment, we provide boutique, strategy-driven asset management solutions with clear investment frameworks. Guided by a disciplined buy-side philosophy, we embed long-term thinking and systematic risk management into every investment decision.
asset_mgmt.reason1_desc: Originating from a single-family office managing proprietary capital, we invest with an owner’s mindset. Our funds are seeded with proprietary capital, ensuring true alignment of interests and shared risk with our clients.
asset_mgmt.reason2_desc: Every product and strategy undergoes strict evaluation by both our Macro Team and Risk Management Team, ensuring prudence in both portfolio construction and execution.
asset_mgmt.reason3_desc: We pursue sustainable absolute returns. Beyond performance, we treat drawdown control as a core discipline, aiming to deliver strong returns while strictly managing downside risk.
asset_mgmt.product_subtitle: We have developed a suite of differentiated strategies tailored to varying risk profiles and wealth objectives.

fund1.name: Yino Global Growth Strategy Fund
fund1.award: “Star FOF Strategy Award”, 3rd China Overseas Fund Summit (2025)
fund1.desc: As our flagship strategy, the Fund seeks to capture global growth opportunities through top-tier hedge fund strategies.
fund1.return_label: Annualized return of 24.48% since inception (as of Feb 2026)
fund1.target: Target Net Annualized Return: 10% – 15% ｜ Target Max Drawdown: < 5%
fund1.h1: About 20% annualized return over three years, with only ~3% monthly drawdown - pursuing steady growth
fund1.h2: Carefully selected top-tier global strategies, with exclusive access to scarce allocations
fund1.h3: Low drawdowns across four market crises, with five consecutive years of positive returns

fund2.name: Yino Heritage Stable Fund
fund2.desc: Designed as a core foundation for family wealth, this strategy emphasizes stability and long-term compounding.
fund2.target: Target Net Annualized Return: 8% – 12% ｜ Target Max Drawdown: < 3%
fund2.investment: Globally diversified multi-asset portfolio including equities, fixed income instruments, mutual funds, hedge funds, and alternative assets
fund2.h3: Strong resilience across market cycles, making it an ideal cornerstone for long-term wealth preservation

asset_mgmt.comm_desc1: Every strategy is backed by our own capital alongside client investments.
asset_mgmt.comm_desc2: We provide regular, detailed, and professional fund reporting.
asset_mgmt.comm_desc3: All products are subject to independent review by both macro and risk teams to safeguard your assets.
asset_mgmt.cta: Speak with Our Investment Professionals, access detailed fund performance and the latest NAV reports.
asset_mgmt.compliance_p1: This material has been prepared by Yino Asset Management Limited, the information contained herein is intended solely for professional investors as defined under applicable laws and regulations. All investments involve risk, and past performance is not indicative of future results.
asset_mgmt.compliance_p2: Any target returns, expected performance, or drawdown controls referenced herein are strategic objectives based on current market conditions and internal models, and should not be construed as guarantees or forecasts.
asset_mgmt.compliance_p3: Investors should make independent investment decisions based on their financial situation, investment objectives, risk tolerance, and professional advice where appropriate.

wealth_mgmt.title: Wealth Management
wealth_mgmt.subtitle_banner: A True Buy-Side Approach, Acting as Your Dedicated Guardian of Wealth
wealth_mgmt.quote: "Standing firmly by your side, connecting you to the world’s most compelling investment opportunities."
wealth_mgmt.intro: In today’s dynamic and unpredictable global markets, finding a truly independent and objective wealth advisor is increasingly challenging. As the core “internal circulation” of our Dual Circulation, One Ecosystem framework, our wealth management services fundamentally redefine the traditional sell-side distribution model. We adopt a pure buy-side approach, delivering fully customized solutions that transcend institutional boundaries and connect you with high-quality investment opportunities across global markets.
wealth_mgmt.values_title: A Pure Buy-Side Perspective: Redefining Alignment of Interests
wealth_mgmt.values_subtitle: At Yino Asset Management, we remain firmly committed to a buy-side philosophy, providing objective, tailored, and client-first wealth advisory services.
wealth_mgmt.v1_desc: As a dedicated buy-side advisor, we think and act entirely from your perspective, ensuring our interests are fully aligned with yours.
wealth_mgmt.v2_desc: Leveraging deep research capabilities and extensive market experience, we construct diversified and balanced portfolios designed to capture opportunities across market cycles while achieving steady wealth appreciation and optimal allocation.
wealth_mgmt.v3_desc: We are not constrained by any single product platform or private bank. With a truly global perspective, we rigorously select high-quality investment opportunities best suited to your needs.
wealth_mgmt.v4_desc: Through institutional-level negotiation power, we effectively optimize overall transaction costs, offering a transparent, flexible, and clearly structured fee model.
wealth_mgmt.mechanism_title: Proprietary Selection Framework: Turning Uncertainty into Clarity
wealth_mgmt.mechanism_subtitle: Rather than following market trends, we rely on a disciplined and systematic framework to build a resilient and upward wealth trajectory for our clients. Every customized portfolio undergoes a rigorous selection process:
wealth_mgmt.compliance_p1:
This material has been prepared by Yino Asset Management Limited, a corporation licensed by the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission. The wealth management services described herein are intended solely for professional investors as defined under applicable laws and regulations.
All investments involve risk. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Investors should make independent investment decisions based on their financial situation, investment objectives, risk tolerance, and professional advice where appropriate.
wealth_mgmt.cta: Speak with a Senior Wealth Advisor, Obtain your personalized asset allocation strategy.

family_office.title: Family Office Services
family_office.subtitle_banner: Beyond Wealth Management — Your Partner in Legacy
family_office.quote: "Extending the boundaries of service through an integrated ecosystem, safeguarding the enduring value of family wealth."
family_office.intro: For high-net-worth families, wealth is no longer defined solely by financial growth. The greater challenge lies in navigating cycles and achieving multi-generational continuity. As the foundational pillar of our Dual Circulation, One Ecosystem framework, Yino Family Office provides a comprehensive ecosystem of support. We recognize the long-term and complex nature of wealth preservation and succession, and are committed to delivering holistic, one-stop solutions that enable families to sustain and grow their legacy across generations.
family_office.services_title: From Wealth Management to Generational Continuity
family_office.services_subtitle: With a focus on the long-term interests of your family, we deliver tailored, end-to-end solutions across four key dimensions: succession, assets, governance, and development.
family_office.s1_subtitle: Building a legacy with a long-term vision
family_office.s1_desc: Leveraging cross-border structuring expertise and global asset coordination, we design bespoke solutions including family trusts and family office structures to support enduring wealth transfer.
family_office.s2_desc: We assist in the development of family charters, governance frameworks, and decision-making protocols to foster alignment and mitigate internal conflicts.
family_office.s3_desc: We provide cross-border structuring and financial advisory services to support the global expansion of family-owned businesses.
family_office.s4_subtitle: Anchored in long-term vision, disciplined in risk control
family_office.s4_desc: Based on your family’s objectives and risk profile, we construct globally diversified portfolios to achieve sustainable growth and orderly wealth transition.
family_office.solution_title: Dual-Hub Solutions: A Seamless Global Perspective
family_office.solution_subtitle: In an increasingly complex global tax and regulatory landscape, the choice of jurisdiction for structuring is critical. Yino Asset leverages two leading international financial centers to deliver best-in-class solutions:
family_office.item1_desc: Dual Asia-Pacific hubs with global connectivity
family_office.item2_desc: Tailored recommendations based on your specific needs
family_office.item3_desc: Our experienced team possesses deep expertise in the latest regulatory frameworks and practical implementation across both jurisdictions, ensuring a seamless client experience
family_office.compliance_p1: This material has been prepared by Yino Asset Management Limited and is intended for informational purposes only for selected audiences. The family office solutions described herein are intended solely for professional investors as defined under applicable laws and regulations. This material does not constitute any legal offer, commitment, or investment advice.
family_office.cta: Start Your Legacy Planning Journey，Connect with our family office specialists.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle_banner: A professional institution dedicated to global asset allocation for high-net-worth clients, grounded in a true buy-side perspective
about.intro_p1: is a professional institution centered on a buy-side perspective, dedicated to providing global asset allocation services for HNW clients. Grounded in our professional foundation as a licensed firm, we have a deep presence in global financial markets. Headquartered in Singapore, with offices in Hong Kong and Hangzhou, we have built a comprehensive global service network.
about.intro_p2: Our commitment to "A Promise of Gold" is solidified by our Hong Kong SFC Types 1 (Dealing in Securities), 4 (Advising on Securities), and 9 (Asset Management) licenses, as well as our Cayman CIMA fund license.
about.intro_p3: We focus on boutique services and possess extensive investment experience in the Single Family Office domain. Our unique "Dual-Loop, One Ecosystem" framework—integrating meticulous wealth planning, precision asset management, and a robust family office ecosystem—serves as a steady staircase for our clients' wealth journey.
about.intro_p4: Guided by our core values of "Sincerity, Trustworthiness, Professionalism, and Efficiency," we explore markets alongside our clients by committing our own capital first. Beyond wealth management, we are your trusted partner in legacy planning and succession.

items.2016_desc: Commenced systematic investment with proprietary capital to establish core investment logic.
items.2023_desc: Established the Singapore office, extending service expertise to a multi-family service model.
items.2024_desc: Integrated Wealth Management, Asset Management, and Family Office services; obtained HK SFC Licenses 1/4/9.
items.2025_desc: Introduced three distinct fund strategies to meet diverse risk appetites.
items.future_desc: Committed to becoming Asia’s leading integrated asset management platform, bridging global opportunities.

answer.title: A Promise of Gold
answer.subtitle: Building a robust fortress to safeguard the long-term value of wealth through our four core values.
answer.p1_desc: With a global perspective, we allocate assets across regions and categories to effectively diversify single-market risks.
answer.p2_desc: Leveraging our deep investment research system, we sift through vast opportunities to select only the finest assets with the highest long-term value.
answer.p3_desc: Utilizing a discretionary mandate, we create precise client profiles to provide tailor-made asset allocation solutions.
answer.p4_desc: We maintain a steadfast buy-side perspective, deeply binding our interests with those of our clients to achieve mutual growth and remain loyal to every trust.

foundation.hz_desc: Bringing together top fintech talent, we support investment decision-making with data-driven insights and enhance service efficiency through technology enablement.

biz.banner_subtitle: Professional strategic planning and comprehensive management consulting services

challenges.title: Challenges Faced
challenges.subtitle: High-net-worth wealth management faces four unprecedented core challenges
challenges.c1_desc: Decline in global geopolitical stability increases uncertainty for cross-border asset allocation; single-market risks rise sharply.
challenges.c2_desc: Domestic asset yields continue to decline, traditional high-yield products shrink, and high-quality assets become scarce.
challenges.c3_desc: Lack of systematic planning for intergenerational heritage leads to concerns over tax risks, governance, and wealth erosion.
challenges.c4_desc: The industry is dominated by sell-side interests, making it difficult for clients to find objective, professional advice.

wealth.title: Internal Loop ｜ Wealth Management
wealth.subtitle: Buy-side Perspective · Bespoke Solutions, connecting you with global premier assets
wealth.m1_desc: Deeply understanding your risk appetite, goals, and life cycle to tailor exclusive management plans.
wealth.m2_desc: Covering the global market for high-quality assets, rejecting short-term speculation to ensure long-term stability.
wealth.m3_desc: Adjusting to macro-economic trends through rebalancing to seek optimized returns at existing risk levels.
wealth.f1_desc: Pure buy-side advisor role; we do not hold client assets and always stand with the client.
wealth.f2_desc: Not limited to single-institution products; scanning the globe for the most suitable assets.
wealth.f3_desc: Leveraging institutional structural capabilities to reduce transaction costs with fully transparent fees.

asset.fund2_subtitle: Target Yield: 8-12% ｜ Risk Level: Low to Moderate

asset.f2_desc: Regularly disclosing portfolios, evaluations, and returns to ensure information symmetry.
asset.f3_desc: Investment decisions undergo dual review by the Investment Committee and Risk Management Dept.

family.c1_desc: Designing heritage plans covering law, tax, and trusts tailored for family characteristics.

case.title: Case Study
case.subtitle: Chairman Zhao’s Wealth Breakthrough
case.name: Zhao Changqing
case.p1_desc: Original domestic portfolio saw a -28% cumulative 3-year return, heavily impacted by market downturns.
case.p2_desc: Domestic business growth slowed; urgent need for overseas expansion and residency planning.
case.p3_desc: Several children with no top-level design for asset succession and educational planning.
case.strategy_subtitle: For Mr. Zhao's complex needs, Yino customized a 'Residency + Architecture + Investment' trinity solution.
case.s1_b1_body: Assisting with a Singapore SFO to leverage its status as a wealth hub for global business access.
case.s1_b2_body: Utilizing Singapore fund tax incentives (13O/13U) and securing EP/PR pathways for the family.
case.s2_b1_body: Liquidating losing domestic positions and rotating into HK high-dividend stocks and global REITs.
case.s2_b2_body: Using offshore trust structures to isolate personal assets from enterprise operational risks.
case.s3_b1_body: Drafting a charter to define wealth distribution, governance principles, and education funds.
case.s3_b2_body: Customizing educational pathways and scholarship strategies using top overseas academic resources.
case.privacy_note: Note: For privacy, 'Zhao Changqing' and related details have been pseudonymized.
